Compliance.description: PPRA registered with valid FFC for agents; no major complaints or violations found in 2025/2026 searches.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed HelloPeter reviews with some poor service complaints; international Harcourts Trustpilot 2.3/5 with rental issues; limited recent SA letting-specific data.

Product Value.description: Standard industry pricing with no transparency on site; comprehensive letting services but lacks specific fee details.

Innovation.description: Proprietary agent apps (eOne, eOpen) via internal App Store; website with property search and valuation tool; no consumer-facing app with ratings.

Customer Support.description: Reviews highlight inconsistent response times and communication; website has contact forms per branch but no 24/7 chat or dedicated support page.

Accessibility & Security.description: No specific POPIA mentions or security incidents found on site; standard website access. Assumed compliant as PPRA registered. No inclusivity details.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Standard SA rates: 8-12% monthly rent + VAT for management; 100% monthly rent letting fee

socialSentiment.summary: Limited recent negative complaints on HelloPeter/Google; no major 2025/2026 scandals; some international poor rental feedback.
